name: French Mushroom Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mushrooms. Leave the caps whole but chop the stems coarsely.
2. Fry the mushrooms in half a cup of olive oil until soft. Set aside to drain.
3. Peel the onions, quarter the lettuce, and slice the tomatoes.
4. Add the onions, lettuce, and tomatoes to a frying pan with celery, lemon juice, tomato paste, thyme, bay leaf, coriander seeds, white wine, and the remaining olive oil.
5. Season the mixture and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes until the onions are tender.
6. Remove the mushrooms to a shallow dish. Bring the remaining ingredients to a rapid boil for 4 minutes.
7. Pour over the mushrooms and chill until ready to serve.
Vegetarian Times Cookbook
